title: henckelia murutorum
intro: Henckelia murutorum, also known as the "mouse ear" plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Henckelia murutorum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or infusion, which is then used to treat various ailments.
